title: Jade Magnifying Glass
description: Only have your Jade UI active when you need it. Also, spyglass-flavored!
body:
# Jade: Magnifying Glass!

![DemonStration](https://github.com/AtmosUrod/jade_magnifying_glass/blob/main/demon_stration.gif?raw=true)

Want to see how many bees there are in that hive but don't want too much UI in your face? Well, then you are probably me— I mean, look no further!

This mod adds a Magnifying Glass that must be held in your main hand or offhand to activate [Jade](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade)'s UI. Being an upgrade to the Spyglass, Magnifying Glass functions both to inspect blocks and zoom in on distant objects. See? No inventory clutter—you were bringing your Spyglass anyway, right?

# How to use the mod?
- **Install** [Jade](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade), of course
- Craft your Magnifying Glass: **Spyglass + Quartz + Stick**
- **Clutch** it tightly in **either** of your hands
- **Look** at stuff!
  - _Clean regularly with a dry cloth_

![Crafting Magnifying Glass](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a809f08941e64d26edb822ca05968b631f74d2e8.gif)
 
# Why use the mod?
- Cleaner UI — [Jade](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade) is there only when you need it
- Progression — Information feels earned (SevTech my beloved)
- Immersion — Your Jade-pilled cyborg eyes can't just scan whatever you want anymore
- Interactivity — Pressing buttons! Crafting items! _Yaaay!_

# Compatibility

Almost sure that the mod will be compatible with **anything** that modifies the vanilla spyglass!

For instance, the Magnifying Glass inherits all mechanics from mods like the amazing **[Spyglass Improvements](https://modrinth.com/mod/spyglass-improvements)** mod that ~~improves~~ makes the vanilla spyglass significantly better in a configurable way. Do check it out, seriously.

# Credits
- **Snownee, Jade Contributors, Waila/Hwyla devs** — for [the amazing mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade)
- **Mojang** — for making CubeWorld
- **My mother** — for yesterday's pancakes
- **Your mother** — ;D
#


### Support

If you enjoy the mod, good for you.
